phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is free to enter
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée des Beaux-Arts in Dijon is free for all visitors — one of the few major French museums with free admission.

responses.english: Yes, entry is free for everyone.
responses.phonetic: wee, lahn-TRAY eh grah-TWEET poor TOOS
responses.french: Oui, l'entrée est gratuite pour tous.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Egyptian collection is located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la collection égyptienne ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah koh-lek-SYON ay-zhep-TYEN
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has an important Egyptian collection, including mummies and funerary objects, on the ground floor.

responses.english: On the ground floor, room three.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop is
phrases.text_local: Où est la boutique du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah boo-TEEK doo myoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum shop sells art books, postcards, and reproductions of works in the collection.

responses.english: Near the exit, on the ground floor.
responses.phonetic: preh duh lah sor-TEE, oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY
responses.french: Près de la sortie, au rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café in the museum
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un kah-FAY dan luh myoo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a pleasant courtyard café open during visiting hours. It's a great spot to rest after exploring the collections.

responses.english: Yes, the museum has a pleasant courtyard café open during visiting hours.
responses.phonetic: wee, say tah lay-TAZH, dahn lay sal doo oh
responses.french: Oui, le musée possède un café agréable dans la cour, ouvert pendant les heures de visite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the toilets are in the museum
phrases.cultural_note: Toilets are available inside the museum on the ground floor.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the reception.
